description_long: This is a medium-sized dog with a short, smooth coat featuring a tricolor pattern of brown, black, and white. The dog has a well-proportioned, athletic build with a straight back, muscular legs, and a long, straight tail held high. Its head is broad with a slightly domed skull, a straight muzzle, and large, expressive eyes. The ears are floppy and hang down close to the cheeks, typical of certain hound breeds. The coat is predominantly white on the legs, underbelly, and tip of the tail, with brown and black patches on the back, sides, and head. There is no visible collar or leash, and the dog appears alert and attentive, suitable for urban environments such as parks or sidewalks.
description: A medium-sized, tricolor dog with a smooth coat, floppy ears, and a high, straight tail. The dog has a muscular build and a friendly, alert expression.
description_view_0: Side view showing the dog's tricolor coat, floppy ears, and straight tail held high.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the straight tail, muscular hind legs, and symmetrical color pattern on the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same tricolor pattern, floppy ears, and alert stance.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the broad head, expressive eyes, and floppy ears framing the face.
